titleStmt.title: SII 41.200: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 200. (A.R. No. 418 of 1905.) Guḍimallūr, Walaja Taluk, North Arcot District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Bhūmīśvara temple at Guḍimallūr.

summary.p: Records that the chief Sambuvarāyan Vīrachampan remitted taxes on artisans and merchants living in the dēvadana lands in favour of the Kiḍāraṅkoṇḍa Chōḻīśvaramuḍaya-Nāyinār temple at Malliyūr. He also gifted 7500 kuli of land in several places free of taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravatti śrīvirapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu
10 4vatu patiṉnālāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟu Irupatil Eḻutiṉa tirumukappaṭikku malliyūruṭai
yār kiṭāraṅkoṇṭa coḷīcuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattāṟku Iṉā
yaṉārkku paḻaiya tevatāṉamāṉa tirumaṭaiviḷākam malliyūr tirupuvaṉa
cuntaraviḷākamum nirkāriyaṉ tāṅkalum naṉcey puñcey nāṟpāṟke
llaikkum Uḷpaṭṭa nilamum Ivvūril Ēṟum puṟakalaṉai kuṭiceṭṭi
kaḷil kaikkoḷar vāṇikar tevayaṅkakuṭi yai nā
kku kuṭimakkaḷ maṟṟum Ēṟum puṟakalaṉai kuṭimakkaḷ perāl kaṭamaiyum palavarikaḷum Āyamum kācāyamum
Ammaṇantāṅkalum kāttikai poṉ vicaiyarāyaṉ tāṅkalum malliyarāya tāṅkalum Ivvūrkaḷ
nañcey puñcey nāṟpāṟkellaiin Uḷpaṭṭa nilamum peṭṭai vaṭakālil nilam nālu veliyum peṭṭai te
ṉ kālil nilam Iraṇṭuveliyum toḻkuḷattūr piṟinta viracampaviḷākattu nilan Eṭṭu veliyum nilam
Iraṇṭu veliyum vaṉṉipeṭu piṟintu viracampa viḷākam nilam Aiñcu veliyum vācalūṇi nilam Iraṇṭu ve

viḷakku Oṉṟukku kuḻi Ainnūṟu Āka vaṉṉipeṭṭil viṭṭa kuḻi Āyiramum peṭṭai vaṭakālil viṭṭa kuḻi Āyiramum peṭṭaiteṉ
kālil viṭṭa kuḻi Aiñnūṟum koḷattūril viṭṭa kuḻi Āyiramum Ammaṇan kālil viṭṭa kuḻi nālāyiramum Āka kuḻi Eḻāyirattu
Ainnūṟum caṟuvamāṉiya Iṟaiyiliyāka naṭakkavum colli viṭṭom Ittaṉmam cantirātittavarai naṭakkumpaṭi kallilum
cempilum veṭṭi koḷḷavum Inta taṉmattukku virotam paṇṇiṉār Uṇṭākil keṅkai Iṭai kumari Iṭai kurā
ṟpacu koṉṟār pāvaṅ koḷvāṉ Ippaṭi cammatittu caṟuvamāṉiyamāka kuṭutteṉ campuvarāyaṉ vīracampaṉeṉ
cimā
Digital edition of SII 41.200 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
